commands.review_summary:
This PR updates `convex/skills.deleteTags.test.ts` so the local mutation harness can exercise trigger-backed summary edits and assert `skillSearchDigest` is patched after `skills` updates.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a tests-only PR. Source inspection shows the covered path: `updateSummary` patches `skills`, and the wrapped mutation trigger syncs `skillSearchDigest`.

target.title: test: cover skill summary digest sync
target.body:
## Summary
- add regression coverage showing owner/admin summary edits update `skillSearchDigest` through the wrapped `skills` table trigger
- make the local mutation test harness faithfully support trigger-enabled `normalizeId`, table-qualified `get`/`patch`, and persisted mock docs
- leave production code unchanged because the existing `mutation` wrapper already syncs the digest on `skills` patches

## Validation
- `VITE_CONVEX_URL=https://example.invalid bunx vitest run convex/skills.deleteTags.test.ts convex/functions.test.ts convex/lib/skillSearchDigest.test.ts`
- `bun run ci:static`
- `bun run ci:unit`
- `bun run ci:types-build`
target.author: patrick-erichsen
